items.title: Microsoft plans $30 billion investment for UK ahead of Trump state visit
items.description: In the plan, Microsoft will expand its UK capital expenditures by $15.5 billion and bring 23,000 advanced AI chips to the UK, company President Brad Smith told reporters.  The UK business climate has improved in the past few years, Smith said, after the country's antitrust regulator dropped opposition to Microsoft's Activision Blizzard acquisition in 2023.

items.title: Microsoft to invest $30B in AI infrastructure in UK
items.description: Microsoft (MSFT) announces a $30 billion investment in AI infrastructure and ongoing operations across the UK. This comes after Alphabet's Google (GOOG, GOOGL) also initiated its own artificial intelligence deal with the UK. Yahoo Finance tech editor Dan Howley joins the show to discuss the details. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.

items.title: Clean Wisconsin says data center power usage could exceed all homes in state combined
items.description: Wisconsin's data center projects may consume more energy than all households in the state combined, according to an analysis from Clean Wisconsin.

items.title: BWS Financial Raises Nebius (NBIS) PT to $130 Following $19.4B Microsoft Contract
items.description: Nebius Group (NASDAQ:NBIS) is one of the best AI stocks to buy according to analysts. On September 9, BWS Financial raised the firm’s price target on Nebius to $130 from $90, while keeping a Buy rating on the shares after the company announced its first hyperscaler contract worth ~$19.4 billion with Microsoft Corp. items.title: Buy CoreWeave Stock, Analyst Says. There’s No End in Sight to the AI Boom.
items.description: Hyperscalers could spend more on AI infrastructure than Wall Street anticipates, Raymond James says.
